caption: A man with long dark hair and glasses stands in front of a brown slatted wall, singing into a microphone. He wears a white collared shirt, a dark blue embroidered vest, and a red and white decorative necklace. He holds a light-colored acoustic guitar, though only the top portion of the instrument is visible. A black microphone stand extends across the frame, positioning the microphone directly in front of his mouth. The text "ORCA" is displayed in white capital letters on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly adjusting his head and mouth as he sings. There is minimal movement in the scene, with the man's facial expression and the slight shift of his guitar being the only visible changes.
